AnimationIdentifier.description: A camelCase identifier referencing an animation token by name

StateName.description: component state eg.: hover, enable, checked, etc. ':noState' is a special state to represent default/no state of the component

PartName.description: ':host' for the element itself, or a CSS part name (e.g. 'prefix-icon')

ComponentFile.description: Root structure of a component animation token source file
ComponentFile.title: ComponentFile

ComponentMap.description: A map of component element names (e.g. 'button') to their animation entries
ComponentMap.title: ComponentMap

ComponentEntry.description: Binds the animation token to the component's part when the state(s) are active on the component

state.description: One or more states that must be active for this rule to apply. Use [":noState"] to represent the default/no-state rule.

ComponentEntry.title: ComponentEntry
